code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let target_opt = io.read_line()
let target = match target_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(body)

mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut in_token = false

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(body, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if in_token
      if current == target
        count = count + 1
      end
      current = ""
      in_token = false
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    in_token = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_token
  if current == target
    count = count + 1
  end
end

println("count=#{count}")
